steps.title: Identify the function
steps.content: The underlined sentence opens with However and reports that new studies show HGT is more common in eukaryotes than originally thought. Its job is to challenge the prior claim that HGT is rarely seen in eukaryotes.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Choice A captures that the sentence implies the common perception is inaccurate. B (frequency comparison), C (research will fail), and D (vertical/horizontal distinction) describe other parts of the passage. That matches choice A — A is correct.
